productDisplayName: Wills Lifestyle Women Off White Dress
description: Style NoteThe summer season offers endless choices when it comes to styling your look. This dress from wills lifestyle combines subtle colours with simple styling add ons which will give you a fashionable look. Pair it with ballerina flats or sandals for a day out with your friends or for a family Sunday brunch. Product DetailsOff white dress, has a round neck, short puffed sleeves, pin tucks in front from the neckline with buttoned detail which flares below the waist, a belt around the waist and a liningMaterial and CarePolyester and Linen blendDry clean onlySize and FitRegularThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
